allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GH_TOKEN\) { "GH_TOKEN set" } elseif \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { "GITHUB_TOKEN set" } else { "No GH token env" })

PowerShell($id = \(gh run list --limit 1 --workflow "CI - Dev \(build + auto-merge to main\)" --json databaseId 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0].databaseId; Write-Output "Watching run $id"; gh run watch $id --exit-status 2>$null; Write-Output "CI-Dev done with exit $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $run = \(gh run list --workflow "Deploy React Client to Cloudflare Pages" --branch main --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,createdAt 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0]; Write-Output "Latest client-deploy run: $\($run.databaseId\) status=$\($run.status\) created=$\($run.createdAt\)"; if \($run.status -ne 'completed'\) { gh run watch $run.databaseId --exit-status 2>$null; Write-Output "Client deploy done exit $LASTEXITCODE" } else { Write-Output "Already completed \(may be the older run; will re-check\)" })
PowerShell(git commit -m "fix\(client\): allow same-origin geolocation in Permissions-Policy \(geolocation=\(self\)\) so location-based weather works")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $id = \(gh run list --workflow "CI - Dev \(build + auto-merge to main\)" --branch dev --limit 1 --json databaseId,status 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0].databaseId; Write-Output "Watching CI-Dev run $id"; gh run watch $id --exit-status 2>$null; Write-Output "CI-Dev exit $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $run = \(gh run list --workflow "Deploy React Client to Cloudflare Pages" --branch main --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,displayTitle,createdAt 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0]; Write-Output "run=$\($run.databaseId\) status=$\($run.status\) conclusion=$\($run.conclusion\) title=$\($run.displayTitle\)"; if \($run.status -ne 'completed'\) { gh run watch $run.databaseId --exit-status 2>$null; Write-Output "deploy exit $LASTEXITCODE"; gh run view $run.databaseId --json conclusion 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List })
PowerShell(git commit -m "chore: update local Claude permission allowlist")

PowerShell($id = \(gh run list --workflow "CI - Dev \(build + auto-merge to main\)" --branch dev --limit 1 --json databaseId,status 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0].databaseId; gh run watch $id --exit-status 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-Output "CI-Dev \(dac5e6e\) exit $LASTEXITCODE"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; gh run list --limit 4 --json workflowName,headBranch,status,conclusion 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-Table workflowName,headBranch,status,conclusion -AutoSize)
